---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for TASK-alavista
title: 'feat: [Brief description of the feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---
## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature is and how it would work within the TASK-alavista workflow.

## 🤔 Use Case / Problem Solved

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature solves. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when I can't..." or "This would make it easier to..."

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine this feature working technically or visually.

* How should the task syntax change (if at all)?
* Should it be a new setting in the UI?
* How does it affect the `.ics` generation?

## 🚫 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📅 Roadmap Alignment

*Check the README Roadmap before submitting.*

- [ ] This is related to a planned v2.0 feature.
- [ ] This is a completely new idea.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. If you are willing to submit a Pull Request to build this feature yourself, please let us know!
